content:
✨ flightgear | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: A highly realistic and customizable flight simulator for entertainment, education, and research.
✨ Key Features: • Free, open-source, and cross-platform • Global scenery (fly anywhere on Earth) • Spaceflight • Complex weather modeling • Online multiplayer and VATSIM support
📖 Summary: FlightGear is a free, open-source, cross-platform flight simulator developed by a global community. It offers realistic global scenery, complex weather modeling, and spaceflight capabilities, making it suitable for enthusiasts, researchers, and even FAA-approved training.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
